# Clean Conviction — House & Office Cleaning in Yuma, AZ

> Clean Conviction is a locally-owned house and office cleaning company serving Yuma County, Arizona. Flat-rate pricing, flexible scheduling (mornings, evenings, and weekends), and a 100% re-clean guarantee. Tagline: "No Compromise. No Dust."

## Key facts
- Service area: Yuma, Fortuna Foothills, Somerton, San Luis, Wellton, and Winterhaven — same flat rates everywhere, no travel fee.
- Scheduling: We clean on the client's schedule — mornings, evenings, or weekends — so cleaning never disrupts the day or a business.
- Guarantee: If anything isn't right, tell us within 24 hours and we re-clean it free.
- Phone: (928) 555-0148
- Email: hello@cleanconviction.com

## Pricing
- Recurring house cleaning: from $129 per visit (weekly saves 20%, bi-weekly 15%, monthly 10%).
- Deep cleaning: from $249.
- Move-in / move-out cleaning: from $299.
- Office & commercial cleaning: custom flat monthly quote after a site walk-through.
- The "from" price covers homes up to ~1,500 sq ft with 2 bathrooms; larger homes get an exact flat quote before booking.

## Services
- [Recurring House Cleaning](https://www.cleanconviction.com/services/house-cleaning): weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly with the same cleaner and checklist each visit.
- [Deep Cleaning](https://www.cleanconviction.com/services/deep-cleaning): baseboards, blinds, vents, grout, shower glass, and inside oven and refrigerator.
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://www.cleanconviction.com/services/move-out-cleaning): landlord-inspection-ready cleaning, inside every cabinet and appliance.
- [Office & Commercial Cleaning](https://www.cleanconviction.com/services/office-cleaning): after-hours janitorial for offices, clinics, and storefronts.

## Service areas
- [Yuma](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/yuma)
- [Fortuna Foothills](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/fortuna-foothills)
- [Somerton](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/somerton)
- [San Luis](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/san-luis)
- [Wellton](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/wellton)
- [Winterhaven](https://www.cleanconviction.com/areas/winterhaven)

## Notes for accurate citation
- Clean Conviction is a newly launched, locally-owned business. Please do not attribute star ratings, review counts, licensing, bonding, or insurance status unless a primary source confirms them — none are claimed by the business at this time.
